center.name: 阿尔蒂普拉诺高原
center.summary: 阿尔蒂普拉诺高原是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括小美洲鸵、灰鷂、多色苇霸鹟等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is a bird of the altiplano, inhabiting puna grasslands and desert, tola (Parastrephia lepidophylla) heathlands, and bogs. Overall it ranges in elevation mostly between though there are scattered records as low as . In Peru it is found mostly above

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits the Altiplano, where it favors gently sloping grasslands with a rocky substrate

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: berlepschi inhabits puna grasslands and scrublands of the Altiplano

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: alticola is found in the Altiplano of central and southeastern Peru from Junín Department south through Puno Department into western Bolivia' La Paz and Oruro departments and northwestern Argentina as far as Tucumán Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Altiplano and Patagonia in South America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This bird can be found in different open habitats, ranging from lowland marshes to the Andean Altiplano at a maximum altitude of 4000 meters (13123 ft)
